lorenz_chaos.class: Case 3* (positive entropy, RECURRENT -- chaotic but returns)

preregistered_falsifier: compact-set dynamics with positive entropy AND no recurrence
verdict: TRICHOTOMY HOLDS: every compact-set candidate lands in the trichotomy and NONE is the forbidden positive-entropy-plus-no-recurrence object. The strongest positive-entropy cases (['lorenz_chaos']) are chaotic yet RECURRENT (Lorenz lambda=+0.88 but recurrence 1.00); novelty search on the compact torus is bounded-recurrent (1.00), not sustained-novel. Sustained novelty without return requires a non-compact value space -- the escape (Case 2) horn -- exactly as the Meta-Optimization Collapse Theorem predicts. Sec 7.5/7.6 survives its strongest adversarial candidates.
